Hit Me Hard And Soft

Billie Eilish
Pop
+

About This Piece

Billie Eilish's 2024 album "Hit Me Hard and Soft" is one of the most emotionally raw and critically acclaimed records of the decade. This LEGO mosaic captures the hauntingly beautiful artwork in stunning pixel detail — deep blues, greys and blacks recreated brick by brick.

A perfect piece for any music lover who connects with Billie's authentic and powerful artistry. Makes a stunning wall display or a meaningful gift.

Handcrafted Custom LEGO Wall Art Gift Idea

Nothing Was The Same

Drake
Hip-Hop
+

About This Piece

Drake's iconic 2013 album "Nothing Was The Same" defined a generation of hip-hop. The famous artwork — featuring a young Drake looking to the sky — is recreated here in intricate LEGO mosaic form, with beautiful blues, browns and sky tones brought to life brick by brick.

A timeless piece that any hip-hop fan will instantly recognise and deeply appreciate. Perfect for bedroom walls, studios, or as a statement gift.

Handcrafted Custom LEGO Wall Art Hip-Hop Classic

Mushtaq

Al Okhwa
Arabic Music
+

About This Piece

Al Okhwa's "Mushtaq" is a celebrated piece of Arabic music that resonates deeply with fans across the region. This LEGO mosaic brings the vibrant and colourful artwork to life with an impressive range of bricks — from rich yellows and blues to warm skin tones and bold blacks.

A beautiful tribute to Arabic music and culture. This piece celebrates the diversity of music we love and is a standout addition to any space.

Handcrafted Custom LEGO Arabic Music Cultural Art

Blonde

Frank Ocean
R&B / Soul
+

About This Piece

Frank Ocean's "Blonde" is widely considered one of the greatest albums ever made. The minimalist yet deeply personal artwork is recreated here as a delicate LEGO mosaic — soft creams, warm browns and subtle greens coming together in a strikingly understated yet powerful piece.

For the true music connoisseur. This piece is a conversation starter and a work of art in its own right — perfect for anyone who appreciates music as a form of emotional expression.

Handcrafted Custom LEGO R&B Classic Collector's Piece
